scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.postinstall: find node_modules -path "*/node_modules/react" -type d -not -path "*/react-native/*" -not -path "*/@expo/cli/*" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find node_modules -path "*/node_modules/react-dom" -type d -not -path "*/@expo/cli/*" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; true
